root.rep_text: รายงานทะเบียนหุ้นหนี้
root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, case sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status when '0' then 'โสด' when '1' then 'สมรส' when '2' then 'ม่าย' when '3' then 'หย่าร้าง' end as marriage_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as age, pka_mem.fp_desc_position(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ) as position_name, substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),1,30) as age_mem_text, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,' ' ) as spouse_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name,
pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as address_member ,
pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!op_date_1!','DD MONTH YYYY') as t_bdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!op_date_2!','DD MONTH YYYY') as t_edate, to_date('!op_date_1!') as adtm_bdate, to_date('!op_date_2!') as adtm_edate
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_member_record_nest_share.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.period, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag,-1,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value,0) as share_decr , decode(sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag,1,sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value,0) as share_incr , sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_stock, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.seq_no, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.doc_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.sign_flag from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail ,sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type where (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = {0}) and (sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date between {1} and {2} ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_share_item_type.item_type = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type order by sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date

r_ktm_member_record_nest_loan.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item where ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'BF' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance > 0 ) or sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code <> 'BF' ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between {1} and {2} ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status is null or sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status ='0') and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code order by sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no

r_ktm_member_record_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no||' '||sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_loan_card where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') )

r_ktm_member_record_nest_concern.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as member_name, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) )
